data.body: PROGRESS CHECKPOINT. Merged: 507 skill worktree-line (ticket d8e9 closed). In review (CI re-running after FFO rebase): 508 bug#4 observability exit0 [was Verified+1, rebased onto new main]; 509 bug#1 macOS-EINVAL test [rebased]; 510 bug#5 autodeploy re-materialize [CI FAILED on macos: autodeploy uses flock (Linux-only, absent on macos runner) -> guard skipped whole deploy incl OBS block; FIXED by stubbing flock+timeout in the PATH-shim test; p2 pushed]. In progress: bug#2 index.lock — event_append retry+reclaim done+tested (held-out RED->GREEN, both mechanisms mutation-proven); SIBLING FOUND: txn.py transitions/claims commit via own _git->run_git, NOT covered -> subagent centralizing helpers into gitutil.run_git_write + wiring txn (held-out txn test RED-confirmed). Filed sibling c593 (autodeploy certbot-timer materialize). LEGITIMACY decided: #3 sign-swallow=defect (fix aligns w/ exit-11 posture); #7 --force=enhancement, user said BUILD NOW; #6/#8 heavy-harness per user. LANDING NOTE: main uses Fast-Forward-Only, so each merge forces rebase+re-CI of pending changes (serial); GitHub origin mirror lags Gerrit — rebase via Gerrit REST /changes/N/rebase, submit against Gerrit tip. REMAINING: #3,#6,#7,#8,#9,#10.
